creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
git has evolved a lot since it's inception and I think they have become much more intelligent on detecting and merging that 1 line of change. :P

On the contrary most common mistakes of ports committers are indeed forgetting to add the new port in the `<CATEGORY>/Makefile`. So for me it is indeed a better point having a conflict rather than entirely forgetting it.
